name: Bombshell Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup sugar (some of it brown, if you prefer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Put the garlic and butter into a large bowl over a saucepan of water on a gentle heat.
3. When the butter has melted, stir in the cocoa and mix well.
4. Add the eggs, sugar, flour, and walnuts, stirring well after each addition.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased and floured 8x10 inch cake pan and decorate with the blanched almonds.
6. Bake for approximately 35 minutes. The top should be springy, but the inside slightly moist.
7. Turn off the heat and place the brownies on a wire rack to cool. Cut into squares or bars.
